stemHtml: What is correct regarding a routine air report and special air report?

options.a: Information for routine air reports is gathered from radiosondes and information for special air reports is gathered from pilots (observations from pilots).
options.b: PIREPs and AIREPs are routine air reports and both can be special air reports if certain circumstances are met.
options.c: An AIREP reports significant weather phenomena and a PIREP reports less significant weather phenomena.
options.d: An AIREP is a routine air report and a PIREP is a special air report.
